title: Wife. Sister. Wife no more.
content:
Wife. Sister. Wife no more.
So now disguised in nothing but friend's clothing, I crossed my legs sitting just to her left, and chewed the fat of every gossip she needed lay waste.
I cracked my neck in certainty, yipping yapping:
"Ask him. For all of those things you demand. Next time he is here, sudden and quick behind your naked back, surprised as he bites your ear--ask him:
come in vigor and in power.
Come in power and in vigor.
In definition. In aim. In purpose
Ask him, and he'll come.
In every way you need him to."
